case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. TGC TRUCK REPAIR, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT TGC TRUCK REPAIR, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TGC TRUCK REPAIR, INC. $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,920.77 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,290.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

documents.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TGC TRUCK REPAIR, INC. $9,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $2,920.77 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,290.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
